name: agraph-utils

metadata.name: agraph-utils
metadata.summary: A set of utilities for working with AllegroGraph

documentation:
# agraph_utils

## Introduction

`agraph_utils` is a python package that supplies a set of helpful functions
to use along with the `agraph-python` package.

## Installation

```bash
pip install agraph_utils
```

## Usage

### BufferTriples

the BufferTriples class allows the user to quickly add large sets
of triples. You can either add triples individually with `add_triple` 
or you can add a list to the buffer as `add_triples`.

classes.name: agraph_utils.buffer_triples.BufferTriples

methods.name: agraph_utils.buffer_triples.BufferTriples.add_triple
documentation:
Add a single triple to the buffer. If the buffer is full, it will be
flushed to the AG repository.

Args:
    triple (list): The triple to be added to the buffer.

methods.name: agraph_utils.buffer_triples.BufferTriples.add_triples
documentation:
Add multiple triples to the buffer. If the list is larger than the 
buffer size, the buffer will be flushed.

Args:
    triples (list[list]): The list of triples to be added 
                             to the buffer.

methods.name: agraph_utils.buffer_triples.BufferTriples.flush_buffer
documentation: Flush the buffer by adding its contents to the AG repository.

A class for buffering triples and flushing them to an AG repository.

Args:
    conn: The AG repository to which the triples will be flushed.
    buffer_size (int): The maximum size of the buffer before flushing.

Attributes:
    conn: The connection object to which the triples will be flushed.
    buffer: The buffer that stores the triples.
    buffer_size (int): The maximum size of the buffer before flushing.
